description_long: This object is a modern computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display and a sleek, minimal bezel. The screen features a digital interface with blue-toned graphics, including a wireframe human head and various data visualizations, suggesting a high-tech or futuristic design. The bezel is thin and slightly raised at the bottom right, providing a subtle accent. The monitor is supported by a robust, angular stand with two cylindrical hinges, allowing for tilt adjustment. The base is broad and geometric, ensuring stability on flat surfaces. No visible buttons, ports, or branding are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sleek, modern computer monitor with a thin bezel, digital blue-toned display, and a sturdy, angular adjustable stand.
description_view_0: Side view showing the monitor's slim profile, angled screen, and dual cylindrical hinge mechanism on the stand.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide display with blue digital graphics, thin bezel, and broad geometric base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and hinge mechanism, with the screen angled similarly to view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain back of the monitor, the central hinge attachment, and the full width of the base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, with a slightly thicker section at the bottom right, finished in matte gray plastic with rounded corners and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, angular flat base with two cylindrical hinge arms connecting to the monitor, made of matte gray plastic and metal, allowing for tilt adjustment.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any edge or surface of the monitor.
